MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PETER J. KEITH, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3908) for Plaintiff;
Attys. CARLY BITTMAN, Esq. of Swanson & McNamara LLP (Tel: 415-477-3800) and ANNE DECKER, Esq. of American Civil Liberties Union Foundation of Northern California (Tel: 415-621-2493) for Defendant.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CELIN DOBLADO-CANACA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. PETER J. KEITH, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3908) for Plaintiff;
